title: Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
summary: Nishant Gupta from Meta SuperIntelligence Labs presents evaluation frameworks for autonomous AI agents in production. The talk covers limitations of offline benchmarks, continuous evaluation pipelines, detection of drift and hallucinations, and metrics for multi-step agentic workflows.
writeup: Nishant Gupta of Meta Superintelligence Labs lays out evaluation frameworks for autonomous AI agents running in production, starting from the limitations of offline benchmarks. The talk addresses continuous (online) evaluation pipelines, detection of concept drift and hallucinations, and metrics built for multi-step agentic workflows including tool use and plan verification. It also covers production readiness, separated evaluation, and human-in-the-loop review. The throughline: static benchmarks alone do not capture how agents behave once deployed, so ongoing measurement is required to catch degradation over time.
